What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A young person with curly brown hair wearing a black t-shirt plays a white snare drum in the foreground. Several men wearing matching grey t-shirts and sunglasses stand in a line in the background, also playing drums. White drumsticks strike the drumheads featuring the Pearl logo. Blue and white water coolers sit on the green artificial turf field near the performers.

Describe the sequence of events during the drumming performance, noting specific actions and visible text on equipment or clothing.
canonical_answer: At 2s, a group begins playing snare drums on a grassy field; at 6s, a scoreboard displaying 'BOO TIGERS' appears behind the drummers; at 10s, the text 'SYSTEM BLUE EXPERIENCE' is visible on grey shirts; at 12s, drumsticks blur from rapid motion during striking; at 18s, the boy in black continues striking the drumhead alongside men in grey.
